texto: The first dance is the worst dance
autor: the last dance is the best dance! All the roads of persistent practice lead to the Land of Perfection!
explicacao: Citação de the last dance is the best dance! All the roads of persistent practice lead to the Land of Perfection! sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The first dance is the worst dance” articula reflexao, mehmet-murat-ildan, dance em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
